tasks.label: Release: Upload With gh
tasks.command: $version = '${input:releaseVersion}'; $tag = 'v' + $version; $zip = Join-Path 'dist' ('bookmark_theme-' + $version + '.zip'); if (-not (Test-Path $zip)) { throw "Missing asset: $zip. Run 'Release: Package Plugin Zip' first." }; $lines = Get-Content CHANGELOG.md; $start = -1; $end = $lines.Count; for ($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) { if ($lines[$i] -match ('^## \[' + [regex]::Escape($version) + '\]')) { $start = $i; continue }; if ($start -ge 0 -and $lines[$i] -match '^## \[') { $end = $i; break } }; if ($start -lt 0) { throw "No changelog section found for version $version" }; $notes = New-TemporaryFile; $section = $lines[$start..($end - 1)] -join "`n"; Set-Content -Path $notes -Value $section -NoNewline; gh release create $tag $zip --title $tag --notes-file $notes; Remove-Item $notes -Force
